validated_by.description: ID of the User that validated the Draft Account for checking

validated_by_name.description: Value of the name claim in the AAD Acces Token

business_unit_id.description: ID of the Business Unit the Draft Account belongs to

account_status.description: Status of the Draft Account - one of Submitted, Resubmitted, Rejected, Approved, Publishing Pending, Deleted

reason_text.description: Required when status is Rejected or Deleted; optional otherwise
